data.jsCode: function txt(){if(message&&message.contact&&message.contact.phone_number){return String(message.contact.phone_number)}if(message&&message.text){return String(message.text).trim()}return ""}function ask(t){send_message({text:t,parse_mode:"HTML"})}function clean(){delete_context("_callback_step")}function norm(s,v){if(s.phone){var c=v.replace(/[^\d+]/g,"");return c[0]==="+"?c:"+"+c}if(s.optional&&v==="-"){return ""}return v}function valid(s,v){if(s.phone){return /^\+?\d{9,15}$/.test(v)}if(s.min){return v.length>=s.min}return v.length>=1}var steps=[{key:"callback_name",prompt:get_context("param_name_prompt")||"Qayta qo'ng'iroq uchun ism va familiyangizni kiriting:",error:"Kamida 3 ta belgi kiriting.",min:3},{key:"callback_phone",prompt:get_context("param_phone_prompt")||"Telefon raqamingizni yuboring:",error:"Telefonni +998901234567 formatida yuboring.",phone:true},{key:"callback_time",prompt:get_context("param_time_prompt")||"Qaysi vaqtda sizga qo'ng'iroq qilish qulay?",error:"Qulay vaqtni yozing.",min:3},{key:"callback_note",prompt:get_context("param_note_prompt")||"Qo'shimcha izoh bo'lsa yozing, bo'lmasa '-' yuboring:",error:"Javobni qayta yuboring.",optional:true}];var step=parseInt(get_context("_callback_step")||"0",10);var answer=txt();if(answer.toLowerCase()==="/cancel"){clean();exit("cancelled")}if(step>0){var prev=steps[step-1];var value=norm(prev,answer);if(!valid(prev,value)){ask(prev.error+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");wait_for_input()}set_context(prev.key,value)}if(step>=steps.length){send_message({text:get_context("param_success_message")||("Qayta qo'ng'iroq so'rovi qabul qilindi. 👤 "+(get_context("callback_name")||"")+" 📞 "+(get_context("callback_phone")||"")+" 🕒 "+(get_context("callback_time")||"")+" 📝 "+(get_context("callback_note")||"-")),parse_mode:"HTML"});clean();exit("completed")}ask(steps[step].prompt+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");set_context("_callback_step",String(step+1));wait_for_input();
